text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Japan Cup is here. Narita Brian
resolves to win the race and go speak with Biwa
Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is among today's opponents. It's
their first G1 rematch since last year's Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She asks Narita Brian what her racing life will look
like from now on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian answers that she's going to keep
running and continue to be a competitor. With
both holding strong to their convictions, their
one-on-one begins!
